b46b7b38.title: Photosynthesis Quiz
questions: Explain photosynthesis in your own words.
Why do plants need sunlight?

f8093dc8.title: Cell Biology Basics
questions: Explain why mitochondria are often called the powerhouse of the cell.
How does photosynthesis enable plants to produce chemical energy from sunlight?
Compare the roles of mitochondria and chloroplasts in a plant cell.
Why is ATP production important for cellular function?
Describe how energy conversion differs between cellular respiration and photosynthesis.
Explain what might happen to a cell if its mitochondria stopped functioning properly.

2db28872.title: Donald Trump: Study Packet Oral Exam
questions: Why is Donald Trump considered unusual among U.S. presidents, according to the packet?
Explain how Donald Trump's early education may have influenced his later careers.
How did Trump's work in business and television help make his name well-known before becoming president?
Compare Donald Trump's path to the presidency with what is typical for most U.S. presidents.
Explain what it means when the packet says the president can 'veto' a law and why this power is important.
Why do you think serving two non-consecutive presidential terms, like Trump and Grover Cleveland did, is rare in American history?

4b6abfdf.title: Donald Trump Study Packet Oral Exam
questions: Explain what makes Donald Trump's path to the presidency unusual compared to most other presidents.
How did Donald Trump's early life and education prepare him for his later careers in business and leadership?

Compare the typical background of U.S. presidents before Trump with his own career path.
Explain the importance of the executive branch and one key role the president plays in government.

Why do you think it is rare for someone to lose a presidential election and then win again years later?
Describe two main responsibilities of the president according to the packet.
How did Trump's early life and education influence his later careers?

634cbaef.title: Donald Trump Study Packet Oral Exam
questions: Explain why Donald Trump is considered unusual in American presidential history.

63cb4189.title: Donald Trump Study Packet Oral Exam
questions: Explain why Donald Trump's time as president is considered unusual in American history.
How did Trump's career before politics help make his name well known across the country?
Why do you think it is rare for someone to lose a presidential election and then successfully win again later, as Trump did?

How did attending a military academy as a teenager influence Trump’s future leadership skills, according to the reading?

e95d9f6f.title: Donald Trump: Social Studies Oral Exam
questions: How does Donald Trump's path to the presidency compare to most other presidents in U.S. history?

Why do you think Trump's background in business and television is important for understanding his later career as president?
How did Trump's time at the New York Military Academy influence his later life, according to the packet?

How does the 22nd Amendment limit the number of times someone can be elected president, and why is this mentioned in Trump's story?

c7e3d408.title: Donald Trump Study Oral Exam
questions: How did Donald Trump's path to becoming president differ from most other U.S. presidents?

Why do you think it is rare for someone to become president, lose an election, and then win again years later?
